roa.docketEntryComment: SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORD RE;DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
APP & ORD RE;DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONTINUE UNDER PC 1050 FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAWT/X:INVITATION TO DISMISS IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE AFTER MISTRIAL DUE TO HUNG JURY PURSUANT TO PC 1385 (MARIN COUNTY MOTION), ISFILED IN COURT BY THE PUBLIC DEFENDER/MO GRTD/TEXT:COURT ORDERS CAUSE DISM PURS PC 1385/MO PC 1385C/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE VISITING JUDGE PHILIP V, SARKISIAN/JAVS/DAWT/ /X:DEFENDANT HAS A SIGNED 977 WAIVER ON FILE,/ /X: COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLIAN IS ALSO  PRESENT TO ASSIST THE DEFENDANT,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE MISTRIAL OTHER THAN HUNG JURY/X: ALL EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THECOURT AND WILL BE RETURNED TO ROOM 101,/CONTD: TO SET IN DEPARTMENT 17 ONAUGUST 10, 2017 AT 9AM/DAWF/ /NTW/LD:09-01-17/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE VISITING JUDGE PHILIP V, SARKISIAN/JAVS/X: ADA CARDOZA FILES PEOPLE'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE OR STIPULATIONAND PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TOPENAL CODE SECTION 1538,5 IN OPEN COURT,/X: COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLIAN IS ALSO PRESENT TOASSIST THE DEFENDANT VIA TELEPHONE,/X: THE 12 SELECTED JURORS AND 2 ALTERNATES ARE SWORN IN BY THE CLERK,//TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PROSECUTION CASE/CONTD: FOR PEOPLE'S CASE AND DEFENDANT'SCASE BEFORE VISITING JUDGE PHLIP V, SARKISIAN IN DEPT 505 AT THE CIVIC CENTER COURTHOUSE/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE SARKISIAN IN DEPARTMENT 505/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL PASSAGLIA FILES A 977 WAIVER FORM ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT FOR TODAY'SAPPEARANCE/977/X:MOTIONS IN LIMINE ARE ARGUED AND RULED UPON/X: 12 JURORSAND 2 ALTERNATE JURORS ARE SELECTED TO TRY THE CAUSE, TO BE OFFICIALLY SWORN TOMORROW, AUGUST 2, 2017,/TEXT=TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE- JURY SELECTION/CONTD: OPENING STATEMENTS AND PEOPLE'S CASE BEFORE VISITING JUDGE PHILIP V, SARKISIAN IN DEPT 505 AT THE CIVIC CENTER COURTHOUSE/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE PHILIP V, SARKISIAN IN DEPT, 505/DAWT/X:NO JAVS RECORDING/X:COURT, DPD JOHN PAUL PASSAGLIA, AND ADA ARIANA CARDOZA  MEET AND CONFER IN CHAMBERS TO DISCUSS TRIAL SCHEDULE AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE,/X:PEOPLE'S TRIAL BRIEF AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE (INCLUDING WITNESS LIST AND PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS) ARE FILED IN COURT, PEOPLE'S MOTION TO PRECLUDEINAPPROPRIATE VOIR DIRE REGARDING JURY SYSTEM IS FILED IN COURT,/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO PC1538,5 AND MOTIONSIN LIMINEARE FILED IN COURT,/CONTD: JURY TRIAL - MOTION TO SUPPRESS, MOTIONS IN LIMINE, AND VOIR DIRE ON 8-1-17 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT 505/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PRETRIAL MOTIONS IN PROGRESS/

/CAL:TRIAL/NP/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ON A 2 HR STANDBY TODAY/LDTR:08-04-17 (STW)/X:BOTH SIDES ARE READY/X:THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED, TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE PHILLIP SARKISIAN, SUPERIOR COURT, DEPARTMENT 505, FORTHWITH FOR TRIAL/ /X:THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO BE PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL AT 13:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 505/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:SPANISH INTERPRETER, EDGAR RIVERA, SWORN,/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:TO SET/DAWT/X:MARIN MOTION WILL BE FILED BY THE DEFENSE ON OR BEFORETRIAL DATE,/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/LD:09-01-17/
/CAL:TRIAL/INTC/LD:08-04-17 (STW)/CONT/TE:1 DAY/DEF:IS PLACED ON A 2 HOURS STANDBY/
